text:
Class: A
Tier: T1
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Director+
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: CISO awareness notification required. DPA executed before implementation begins.

Class: B
Tier: T1
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Manager+
Fast-Track Eligible?: CONDITIONAL
Required Approvals / Notes: DPA required if personal data in scope. Confirm data subject categories and legal basis before execution.

Class: C
Tier: T1
Approval Path: FAST_TRACK
IT Security Review: Notification only
Legal / DPA Review: Not required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Manager+
Fast-Track Eligible?: ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: No DPA required. Standard NDA / confidentiality provisions apply. IT Security notification for any system integration, even if non-regulated.
